input.raw_idea: Startup pitch for a creator growth studio used by newsletter writers, video educators, and streamers to plan a content calendar, repurpose long-form clips, track audience growth, manage fan community prompts, and package sponsorship offers. The deck mentions a creator marketplace someday, but there are no supply-side sellers, demand-side buyers, escrow, or transaction frequency metrics yet.
input.goal: Evaluate creator retention, content production frequency, creator workflow fit, audience growth, monetization, platform dependency, and willingness to pay by creator segment.
input.context: Community and marketplace language is realistic noise; creator workflow and audience ownership should remain primary.

not_contains.name: no marketplace enterprise developer medical drift

labels.name: unsupported claims cannot be high confidence
